## Problem

<!-- What's missing, broken, or painful today? Be concrete. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- What should we do? If it's a design change, explain the approach. -->

## Why this over alternatives

<!-- What else did you consider? Why is this better? -->

## Impact on existing ADRs

## Rough scope
